title: PlanReviewAssembleCriteriaOutput
description: OUTPUT of `plan_review_assemble_criteria`: a per-criterion `include_<ID>` boolean (the INCLUDED set route_criteria selected — proportionate scrutiny + overlay triggering) the batch step's `when` reads, plus the `routing` record {single_turn[], agent_tier[]}. Dynamic-keyed (one `include_<ID>` per canonical criterion) so this output deliberately carries NO top-level `properties` — it is UNKNOWN to the reference name-existence linter by design (never a false 'undeclared output' error on an `include_<ID>` ref).

^include_[A-Za-z0-9]+$.description: Whether this criterion is in the routed INCLUDED set.
